title: Store Website Invite
description: A command to invite server members to your store!
body: ## Overview **Fully Working Store Website Invite Command** Just Like On **DonutSMP**! **Command(s):** /store ![/store](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b949b0e36f090a5208c1b46a7a6289105d2192a3_0.webp) ### Fully Customizable: - Command's Sound - Command's Message - Command's Cooldown ### Cooldown: ![Cooldown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5add72f2477a9f0bbd15455116438c957d73f695.png)
